nodes.title: Bakery Business Foundations
nodes.rationale: Understand the core concepts and unique challenges of operating a bakery. This module sets the stage for all subsequent steps. Podcasts are great for learning business basics on the go.
suggested_micro_topics: Market research basics for food industry
Understanding startup costs for a bakery

nodes.title: Mastering Bakery Products & Menu Development
nodes.rationale: Develop a strong product offering that appeals to your target market. For a beginner, hands-on skill development is paramount.
suggested_micro_topics: Core baking techniques (breads, pastries, cakes, cookies)

nodes.title: Crafting Your Bakery Business Plan
nodes.rationale: A comprehensive business plan is your roadmap to success, outlining your vision, strategies, and financial projections. Essential for securing funding and staying focused.
suggested_micro_topics: Detailed market analysis and competitive landscape
Funding options for small food businesses

nodes.title: Legal, Licensing & Health Compliance
nodes.rationale: Navigate the essential legal and health regulations to ensure your bakery operates safely and legally, avoiding costly penalties.
suggested_micro_topics: Food handler permits and certifications (e.g., ServSafe)
Local zoning laws for commercial kitchens

nodes.title: Kitchen Setup & Supply Chain Management
nodes.rationale: Establish an efficient and compliant kitchen space and manage your ingredient supply effectively to maintain quality and control costs.
suggested_micro_topics: Food storage and rotation best practices

nodes.title: Marketing & Branding Your Bakery
nodes.rationale: Create a compelling brand identity and effective marketing strategies to attract and retain customers. Podcasts on small business marketing can be very insightful.
suggested_micro_topics: Developing a unique bakery brand story
Social media marketing for food businesses
Local SEO and Google My Business setup
Partnerships and collaborations (e.g., local cafes, events)

nodes.title: Financial Management & Profitability
nodes.rationale: Understand your costs, manage finances, and set pricing to ensure your bakery is profitable and sustainable.

nodes.title: Launching & Growing Your Bakery
nodes.rationale: Execute a successful launch and lay the groundwork for continuous improvement and expansion.
suggested_micro_topics: Soft launch vs. grand opening strategies
Gathering and acting on customer feedback
Exploring new product lines or sales channels
